Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I have thought about this even in my dreams...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}If I returned to my home country now, I would never forgive myself![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I want to stay here in Japan even if I have to eat dirt![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}Katajikenai! It means the world to know you are here for me, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Jitsu wa—actually, I have come up with a plan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Jitsu wa—actually, I have come up with a plan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems pretty excited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Oui, I will return to my home country.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Mochiron—but of course, I will not give up just like that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Once I persuade my uncle, I will return![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I will show him that this is a wonderful country![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}All I need to do is figure out how to explain it to him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}And with you at my side, I know I will find a way![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Please, {f 4 2}-dono! I can't do it without you! Onegaishimasu![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense that Bebe trusts me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}We will pick this up next time. See you later, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}We will pick this up next time. Peace out, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}We'll pick this up next time. Until we meet again, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}We will pick this up next time. I'll be back, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Bebe[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
